title: Stray Kids Quiz
description: Can you answer these 10 questions on Stray Kids?.

questions.question: Which Stray Kids member trained the longest under JYP?
Which member almost got eliminated from during the survival show?
Which Stray Kids song was their first music show win?
Which member is known for the lyric 'Cooking like a chef, I'm a 5-star Michelin'?
What year did Stray Kids officially debut?
Which two members are from Australia?
Which Stray Kids unit focuses on producing music?
Which Stray Kids album includes the song 'Thunderous'?
Which member is known for his love of cats?
